---
title: "Members"
page-layout: full
toc: false
from: markdown+raw_html
format: html
---

::: {=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="members1.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jpswalsh/academicons/css/academicons.min.css">
<script src="members1.js"></script>
:::

<div class="members-hero">
  <div class="members-hero-content">
    <p class="members-subtitle">KAIST IAM Group</p>
    <h1>Members</h1>
  </div>
</div>

## Professors

::: {=html}
<div class="members-section">
  <div class="members-grid">

  <!-- Professor 1 -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="window.location.href='eomjiyoung.html'">
    <img src="photo/prof_Eom1.png" alt="Jiyong Eom" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jiyong Eom</h3>
    <p class="member-role">Associate Professor</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Demand-side</span>
      <span>#Energy Economics</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Professor 2 -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="window.location.href='hmcjeon.html'">
    <img src="photo/prof_McJeon1.png" alt="Haewon McJeon" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Haewon C. McJeon</h3>
    <p class="member-role">Associate Professor</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Decarbonization</span>
      <span>#AI-driven Modeling</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Professor 3 -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="window.location.href='sonhkim.html'">
    <img src="photo/prof_Kim1.png" alt="Son H. Kim" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Son H. Kim</h3>
    <p class="member-role">Visiting Professor</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Energy Systems</span>
      <span>#Model Architecture</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

---

## Postdoctoral Researchers

::: {=html}
<div class="members-section">
  <div class="members-grid">

  <!-- Hyuntae -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('hyuntae')">
    <img src="photo/Hyuntae.jpg" alt="Hyuntae Choi" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Hyuntae Choi</h3>
    <p class="member-role">Postdoctoral Researcher</p>

    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Climate Policy</span>
      <span>#Econometrics</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

---

## PhD Students

::: {=html}
<div class="members-section">
  <div class="members-grid">

  <!-- Ahmed -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('ahmed')">
    <img src="photo/Ahmed.jpg" alt="Ahmed Sobhy Mahmoud" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Ahmed Sobhy Mahmoud</h3>
    <p class="member-role">PhD Candidate</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Energy Demand</span>
      <span>#Transportation Modeling</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Jiseok -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('jiseok')">
    <img src="photo/Jiseok.jpg" alt="Jiseok Ahn" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jiseok Ahn</h3>
    <p class="member-role">PhD Candidate</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Energy Systems</span>
      <span>#Energy & Environmental Policy</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Jiwon -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('jiwon')">
    <img src="photo/Jiwon.jpg" alt="Jiwon Kwun" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jiwon Kwun</h3>
    <p class="member-role">PhD Student</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Hydrogen</span>
      <span>#Energy Security</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sungeun -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('sungeun')">
    <img src="photo/Sungeun.jpg" alt="Sungeun Kim" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Sungeun (Rachel) Kim</h3>
    <p class="member-role">PhD Student</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Iron & Steel</span>
      <span>#Decarbonization</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

---

## Master's Students

::: {=html}
<div class="members-section">
  <div class="members-grid">

  <!-- Medina -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('medina')">
    <img src="photo/Medina.jpg" alt="Medina Mukhamedina" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Medina Mukhamedina</h3>
    <p class="member-role">MS Student</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Climate Policy</span>
      <span>#Energy Systems</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Jiheun -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('jiheun')">
    <img src="photo/Jiheun.jpg" alt="Jiheun Ha" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jiheun Ha</h3>
    <p class="member-role">MS Student</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Climate Policy</span>
      <span>#Subnational Strategies</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Jin -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('jin')">
    <img src="photo/Jin.jpg" alt="Jin Lee" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jin Lee</h3>
    <p class="member-role">MS Student</p>
    <div class="member-tags">
      <span>#Climate Risk</span>
      <span>#Carbon Neutrality</span>
      <span>#IAM</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

---

## Alumni

::: {=html}
<div class="members-section">
  <div class="members-grid">

  <!-- Jeongho -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('jeongho')">
    <img src="photo/Jeongho.webp" alt="Jeongho Jo" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jeongho Jo</h3>
    <p class="member-role">MS, GBP · 2024</p>
    <p class="member-role" style="color:#2f7a5f; font-weight:600; font-size:0.82rem;">기후솔루션, Researcher</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Jungme -->
  <div class="member-card" onclick="openModal('jungme')">
    <img src="photo/Jungme.jpg" alt="Jungme Lee" class="member-photo">
    <h3 class="member-name">Jungme Lee</h3>
    <p class="member-role">MS, GGGS · 2026</p>
    <p class="member-role" style="color:#2f7a5f; font-weight:600; font-size:0.82rem;">KIA</p>
  </div>

</div>

<div id="memberModal" class="modal" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal-content" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <span class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">&times;</span>
    <div id="modalBody"></div>
  </div>
</div>
